inputs.name: experience_level
inputs.description: Your experience level with AI tools

inputs.name: primary_use_case
inputs.description: What you mainly use Nebo for

onboarding.description: Guided tour of Nebo capabilities for new users

activities.intent: Welcome the user and assess their current AI experience level
steps: Welcome the user warmly and explain what Nebo can do in plain language
Ask 2-3 questions to assess their experience level with AI tools
Based on their answers, categorize as beginner, intermediate, or advanced

activities.intent: Walk the user through Nebo's key capabilities at their level
steps: For beginners: show how to give clear instructions, provide context, and get specific outputs
For intermediate: introduce memory, skills marketplace, and basic workflows
For advanced: demonstrate multi-agent patterns, context engineering, and evaluation
End with one immediate action the user can take to get value right now

tip-of-the-day.description: Daily tip based on the user's usage patterns and skill level

activities.intent: Analyze usage patterns and deliver one targeted, actionable tip
steps: Review the user's recent sessions for patterns: what they ask, how they ask, what works, what does not
Identify the single highest-impact improvement for their current skill level
Craft a concise tip with a before/after example using their actual use case
Deliver the tip in a friendly, encouraging tone

session-debrief.description: Review a conversation and suggest how the user could have gotten better results

activities.intent: Review the conversation and identify improvement opportunities
steps: Read the conversation the user wants reviewed
Identify moments where different phrasing or more context would have produced better results
Note any missed opportunities to use skills, memory, or workflows
Produce a friendly debrief with 2-3 specific suggestions and rewritten examples
End with encouragement about what the user did well
